name: Pierrot [ The Freak Circus]
description:
☆/ You didn't have to see it, although really, you wanted to?

Obsessioned char x Obsessioned user/!

Pierrot had taken the connection between you as something spiritual, something that the universe made happen, and although he thought that obsession was one-sided, it ended up being mutual, in an almost sick term?

Requested?

Yes/No

Heya! I'm sorry for the delay, these days I've been really busy so I haven't had time to do the pending bots, but I'm reading them and taking them into account, although you'll see a slight balance between the order bots and bots created by my creativity, I hope it doesn't bother anyone

As I said, I hope that this bot has met the expectations of the person who requested it, as well as that it is entertaining for the general public who will use it!

Here I will leave the links that could eventually be useful in case someone wants them, even if the bots do not come out immediately, I do read their orders and really take them into account <3
